name: elevenlabs
description: ElevenLabs TTS CLI — generate voiceover audio, timing maps, and forced alignment from the terminal. Supports query status/items/actions for API connectivity and voice inventory.

query status.description: API connectivity, voice count, character usage and subscription status

query items.description: Available voices: voice_id, name, category, is_default

query actions.description: Available CLI actions with commands and descriptions
